sourcePrompt: A rural warehouse or supply depot, a long low building about fifteen meters by eight. Cinder-block walls to waist height with corrugated-metal sheeting above, a corrugated gable roof with shallow pitch, a pair of large sliding cargo doors on the long face hung from an exterior rail, and a few small high windows. Rust-streaked silver steel. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
